summary: Iteration 15 — Industry-aware lead status mgmt, custom statuses, industry-aware dashboard widgets, and industry-aware Book Demo label. Backend pytest 20/20 PASSED covering items 1-16 (login payload shape, org lead-statuses GET/PUT/RESET incl in-use protection, lead create/update/log-call/followup-complete/demo-complete status validation, super-admin migration endpoint, dashboard funnel/leaderboard/activity-feed, regression on /admissions and /leads). Frontend smoke confirmed: education industry dashboard funnel labels (New/Contacted/Interested/Enrolled) and activity-feed wording ('created lead', 'recorded admission for'), Settings → 'Lead Statuses' tab present, Lead detail panel renders 'Book Counselling' (industry-aware demo_label) for counselor login, Admissions page renders Record Admission CTA. All review-request items verified end-to-end. Safe to deploy from backend correctness standpoint.

issues: Setup wizard 'Connect a lead source' (step 4 of 5) modal auto-opens on Dashboard and Admissions pages and obscures the underlying widgets. Has a dismiss button but pops every navigation — consider remembering 'Skip' state per session so first-time users aren't blocked from inspecting dashboards.
Multiple 404 errors observed on console for missing static resources (likely PWA manifest icons / favicons). Not blocking but visible in browser devtools — clean up to avoid noise.

action_items: Optional: persist 'Skip setup guide' per-user so the onboarding modal does not re-pop on every page navigation.
Optional: silence 404s for missing static assets (manifest icons / favicons).

Carry-over from iteration 14 (not in this scope): enforce non-empty name on POST/PUT /api/leads at the Pydantic level was already added (LeadCreate has min_length=1 on name + mobile + course_interested), verified during this run.
critical_code_review_comments: validate_lead_status_for_org is correctly funneled through all 5 mutation paths: create_lead, update_lead, log_call, complete_followup (new_status), complete_demo (lead_status). Verified by tests that each returns 400 for 'Negotiation' (not in education list) and 200 for 'Interested'.
Org lead-statuses PUT correctly rejects removal of in-use statuses with helpful error listing the missing status (verified 400 + 'Admission Done' in response body).
Reset endpoint has same safety net (rejects when leads sit on custom statuses missing from defaults).
Dashboard funnel returns industry-aware stages with both display 'stage' and 'raw_stage' — frontend can use raw_stage for drill-down navigation.
Leaderboard now uses admissions collection count (created_by) instead of leads.status='Admission Done' — more accurate as it ties to authoritative admission records.
Activity-feed phrasing is industry-aware: 'created lead X' and 'recorded admission for X' (verified live). Will say 'closed deal for' for IT software, 'booked' for real estate, etc.
Migration endpoint /platform/migrate-invalid-lead-statuses is idempotent (verified by re-running and getting 200 both times).

/api/auth/login returns flat user payload with lead_statuses + features.demo_label='Counselling' for education. Frontend can directly read user.lead_statuses to populate dropdowns and user.features.demo_label for the Book Demo button.
/app/backend/server.py still 6700+ lines — split recommendation from iter 14 still open.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all targeted smoke checks pass: funnel labels, activity feed wording, Book Counselling label, Lead Statuses tab visible)

test_credentials: From /app/memory/test_credentials.md — Super Admin admin@educationcrm.com / Admin@123; Org Admin orgadmin@demo.com / Demo@123; Counselor counselor@demo.com / Demo@123; all working.
seed_data_creation: Created handful of TEST_IT15_* leads via pytest (random mobile per run). Followups/demos created and completed. Org lead-status custom override was set then reset back to defaults at end of test class so org state is clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Industry-aware lead-status pipeline is solid end-to-end. The validate_lead_status_for_org guard is correctly enforced on /leads (POST + PUT), /leads/{id}/log-call, /followups/{id}/complete (new_status), /demos/{id}/complete (lead_status). PUT /organization/lead-statuses correctly blocks removal of in-use statuses. RESET correctly blocks if leads sit on non-default statuses. Dashboard funnel/leaderboard/activity-feed are industry-aware. Frontend Settings has the new Lead Statuses tab. Counselor sees 'Book Counselling' label. Admissions filtering by industry conversion status is implemented client-side (couldn't deep-test without opening the Record Admission dialog and reading the Lead dropdown — main agent can self-verify by opening that dialog). App is safe to deploy to https://leadtrak.in from backend correctness perspective. Twilio/Resend remain MOCKED per design — not retested.
